stimulus:
Welcome!

In this study, you will play three short video games that were generated by Artificial Intelligence (AI) and complete a short survey after each game.

Please make sure you are in a quiet environment where you can focus for the duration of the study. Some games may use sound, so please ensure that your device's volume is not muted.

Press any key to begin.
Press any key to proceed to the first video game. Should you encounter a game-breaking bug, please report the issue in the Menu tab to the right of the screen.

response: {"creativity-rating":2,"creativity-free-response":"The game is actually pretty boring, that's my honest take, because the instructions were not pretty clear and i tried to save the cities, when they are protected the tile is highlighted in yellow, that yellow isnt visible enough, when i focus on other tiles i cant see that the other tiles are not protected anymore, the objective was clear and simple, it was kind of stressful and thats a good thing, you want to stay engaged, but could work on the animations more. overall its a simple basic game not much creativity to it, pretty straightforward instructions, save the cities.","originality-rating":2,"originality-free-response":"it felt like i am playing a game on my old desktop pc in the early 2000's, 2D simple game, very nostalgic, not original at all its similar to a lot of games i played during those times, and as i said in the previous question's answer, you could work on the animations more and make the instructions clearer or add another objective to it","effectiveness-rating":1,"effectiveness-free-response":"I am being honest here, its kind of normal and slightly boring, you only click tiles, you have to pay attention to the tiles when they are no longer being protected that is the challenging part, but i didnt enjoy playing it, i could spend my time playing another game if i had to","authenticity-rating":1,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":2,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"as i said in the previous questions' answers, it felt like some old retro games that i have played in my childhood on my old pc, with basic goals such as clicking or moving with keyboard to protect people or a princess, so its not authentic, and it feels like the developer didnt put much effort into making it."}

response: {"creativity-rating":4,"creativity-free-response":"i like it, it had a dark map and a flaring light on the moving object so that you can see the way to move, you had to start off your brain and try to remember the way back too, i like games like this, its creative but the concept is already seen before so it not that creative, its slightly creative i like it.","originality-rating":3,"originality-free-response":"i have played many maze games and puzzle games that need some thinking and memory, i like this one, you had to look for obstacles and try to avoid them to reach the goal while trying to remember the way back, the flaring flashing light that shows you the way felt original, the maze is kind of unoriginal but still very amusing i like it, and yes some parts caused a sense of surprise, when trying to move and avoid obstacles, sometimes you can run into invisible walls and that surprised me, i dont know if that is on purpose but i like it too","effectiveness-rating":4,"effectiveness-free-response":"i loved the invisible walls, i loved the idea of a flashing light that shows you only part of the way, and the way that you had to remember the way back, i am sure i would enjoy this game if it had more levels with different difficulties","authenticity-rating":3,"attention-check":3,"intentionality-rating":4,"authenticity-intentionality-free-response":"the developer may have based this game on some existing ideas, but it does not seem like a rip off, i like that the developer thought of not showing the whole way, and if the developer meant including invisible obstacles then i like their personal effort, if not then when you think about it, it could be a lack of effort in developing "}
